mapper.select: SELECT id, spot_id, name, description, base_price, max_people, active, created_at, updated_at FROM fishing_product WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, spot_id, name, description, base_price, max_people, active, created_at, updated_at FROM fishing_product ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, spot_id, name, description, base_price, max_people, active, created_at, updated_at FROM fishing_product WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fishing_product ( spot_id, name, description, base_price, max_people, active ) VALUES ( #{spotId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{basePrice}, #{maxPeople}, #{active} )
mapper.update: UPDATE fishing_product SET spot_id = #{spotId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, base_price = #{basePrice}, max_people = #{maxPeople}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}
